description_long: This is a dark metallic vase with a bulbous lower body, a tall, narrow neck, and a wide, flared mouth. The surface is adorned with subtle, engraved floral or ornamental motifs, giving it an antique and decorative appearance. A prominent, curved spout extends from one side, while a slender, arched handle is attached to the opposite side, suggesting a design inspired by traditional ewers or pitchers. The base is broad and stable, supporting the weight of the vessel. The finish is glossy, reflecting light and highlighting the intricate surface details. The overall form and embellishments suggest it is both functional and ornamental, suitable for display in refined urban settings.
description: A dark, glossy metallic vase with a bulbous base, tall neck, ornate engravings, and a curved spout and handle, reminiscent of a traditional ewer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bulbous body, tall neck, and flared mouth, with the spout and handle not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, curved spout extending outward and the arched handle on the opposite side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded body and neck, with the spout and handle mostly hidden from sight.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the spout and handle, as well as the engraved surface details on the body.
